/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libnumber_converter__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libnumber_converter__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/number_converter__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/number_converter/srv/detail/roman_to_decimal__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/li/ros2_hw2/build/number_converter:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libnumber_converter__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.5 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
